page: Amazon Web Services r8in.16xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by Intel processors. It features 64 virtual CPUs mapped to 32 dedicated physical cores with hyper-threading enabled at 2.0 threads per core. The processor operates at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz, providing high single-core and multi-core compute capabilities.

The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local NVMe storage, meaning all storage operations rely on external network-attached block storage. This design separates compute and memory resources from persistent storage volumes.

Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, the r8in.16xlarge delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This high-speed networking capability supports intensive EBS and network communication, making it suitable for distributed environments that require high throughput and low latency.

Given its memory-heavy profile and high-speed networking, this instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory caches, and real-time data processing. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high resource density of memory and dedicated CPU cores provides a balanced profile for enterprise applications requiring substantial RAM without the need for local physical disks.
description: Amazon Web Services r8in.16xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by Intel processors running at 3.9 GHz. It is equipped with 64 vCPUs, 32 dedicated physical cores, and 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB. Operating on the AWS Nitro hypervisor, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options. This hardware configuration is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large-scale databases, in-memory data grids, and real-time analytics. The high density of RAM relative to compute resources offers qualitative cost efficiency for applications that require massive memory footprints and high-speed network throughput without the overhead of local physical drives.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8in.16xlarge is a memory-optimized x86_64 instance featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large databases and in-memory workloads.
meta_description: Amazon Web Services r8in.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps network bandwidth on the Nitro hypervisor.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 platform featuring high-speed networking and dedicated Intel processors for demanding database and in-memory enterprise workloads.

512.0 GB of system memory optimized for large-scale data footprints
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth powered by the AWS Nitro hypervisor
No local storage included, optimized for network-attached EBS volumes
Best suited for in-memory databases, caching layers, and real-time analytics
